metadata.title: Descend Passed Nothing
metadata.artist: And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun
tracklist: 01 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Grievously; Painfully; We Move
02 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - ...To Be Released From Shame
03 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - See The Fruits Of Your Discontent
04 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Exist As A Curse Unto Ourselves
05 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Have Descended Passed Nothing
06 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Follow; All That We Know
